full_text:
Chen Tao йҷіжЎғ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Tao (йҷіжЎғ)was born in Kuaji. Was said to have seen Yu Fan meeting with sages and immortals in his dreams. Chen Tao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
